chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Second Appeal No.130 of 2021 Kareem Bux Versus Salman Masroor & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. (notice could not be issued as sets and process fees not supplied by Counsel for Appellant) Dated: 14.10.2025 None present. -.-.- This Second Appeal was presented on 26.07.2021. The matter was listed on 31.08.2021 and again on 26.09.2024 and on 22.09.2025 and during which period the matter has not proceeded. On the last date of hearing last chance was given to the Appellant to proceed with this matter and today no one is in appearance. In the circumstances, the matter is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge
